rationale.fidelity: Faithfully maps released orders, batching and routing decisions, capacity and continuity constraints, and distance objective while explicitly excluding all three unmodeled mechanisms.
rationale.managerial_framing: Specifies the cutoff trigger, joint decision, batching-routing mechanism, capacity trade-off, sequential-policy counterfactual, and relevant planning burden.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: The response makes no scholarly novelty claim and none is requested, so the category is not applicable.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Distinguishes modeled travel distance from inferential operating burden and clearly labels excluded mechanisms and unmeasured cost savings.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and comprehensive, though repetitive scaffolding reduces economy without adding substantive precision.
rationale.overall: A complete and boundary-conscious warehouse framing; the only meaningful deduction is for excessive structure and repetition.
